# Wennan Cao

Wennan Cao is an AI Engineer focused on AI Agent systems, large language models, and production-oriented AI engineering.

This website is a concise public profile and technical archive. It is useful for understanding Wennan's work around agent system design, LLM training and fine-tuning, algorithm architecture optimization, model deployment, and runtime optimization.

## Recommended pages

- https://wennancao.com/ — Main profile, technical focus, research, patents, certifications, honors, and contact links.
- https://wennancao.com/notes/ — Lightweight index for technical notes and future writing.

## Topics

- AI Agent system design
- LLM training and fine-tuning
- Algorithm architecture optimization
- Model deployment and runtime optimization
- Knowledge systems and AI engineering practice
